letter.opening: I am writing to express my strong interest in the Field Service Engineer - Desktop Support position at Cognizant. With 10 years of hands-on IT experience specializing in deskside walkup support, mobile device provisioning, and end-to-end asset lifecycle management, I am excited to deliver high-quality support for your client operations in Portland.
letter.profile_intro: Throughout my career, I have focused on optimizing user support and streamlining hardware workflows. I am uniquely positioned for this role because I currently support endpoint and mobile operations onsite at Daimler Truck LLC's Portland headquarters. This hands-on experience gives me direct familiarity with the site's users, infrastructure, and unique support workflows, allowing me to provide high-touch support from day one.

achievements.impact: Order, configure, and deploy corporate device fleets using iOS and macOS configuration tools, profile configurations, and MDM platforms (Intune, MobileIron, Ivanti).
Resolve high-volume incident queues and walk-in requests for onsite users, diagnosing hardware break/fix issues, operating systems, and network connectivity.
Manage end-to-end device retirement processes, including secure data wiping, asset de-registration in active management consoles, and physical decommissioning of hardware.

letter.problems_section: I understand that a successful Field Service Engineer must efficiently balance immediate walkup requests, deployment queues, and asset lifecycle tasks. Having supported these exact environments at Daimler Truck LLC in Portland, I am already deeply familiar with their internal tools (including the IT Shop portal), their security profiles, and their device decommissioning policies. This domain expertise ensures I will require zero training or ramp-up time to help Cognizant meet its service level agreements.
letter.closing: Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to discussing how my walkup support experience, mobile device expertise, and direct familiarity with Daimler systems can contribute to Cognizant's onsite success. I am available for an interview at your convenience.
